title: Author Correction: Cerebellar state estimation enables resilient coupling across behavioural domains
abstract: “Funding for this research was provided by the Wellcome Trust (220114/Z/20/Z, 209453/Z/17/Z, 205103/Z/16/Z, 108899/B/15/Z), the Canada-UK Artificial Intelligence Initiative (ES/T01279X/1) and the Leverhulme Trust (RF-2021-533).”
